system.notes:
Abilities

  • Grasping Legs: If the spirit hits a target with its Slash attack, it immediately makes a subdual test: Body + Athletics opposed by the target’s (Body or Agility) + Athletics. If the spirit wins, the target gains the Immobilized status. The spirit can only immobilize 1 target at a time. The target can spend a Major Action to repeat the subdual test. If the target wins, they are no longer Immobilized. ROACH FLESH FORM SPIRIT

Traits

  • Physical, Fire and Cold Resistance:
  • Unphased: Can’t gain Frightened or Wounded status.
  • Toxin & Disease Immunity: The spirit is immune to
  • diseases & toxins other than insecticides.:
  • Banishing Resistance: When targeted by the Negate
  • Mysticism power, double the spirit’s Force.:
  • Dual Natured: Insect spirits always exist on both the
  • astral and physical plane.:
  • Fear of Sunlight: While in natural sunlight, the spirit
  • suffers the Frightened status.:
  • Improved Crit: On attack tests, the spirit scores a
  • critical hit with their Crit Dice on a 5 or a 6.:
